footer.stayUpdatedDesc: Get the latest insights on web development, AI, and digital growth.

home.heroTitle: Build. Grow. Dominate Your Digital Presence.
home.heroSubtitle: Where bold ideas become intelligent digital experiences.
home.heroDesc: At Forge9X, we partner with ambitious businesses to design, build, and scale powerful digital products and AI-driven solutions. From the first idea to launch and beyond, we combine strategic thinking, modern software engineering, and artificial intelligence to solve complex challenges, accelerate innovation, and create technology built for lasting growth.
home.servicesDesc: From websites to AI we have the expertise to digitise and accelerate your business at every stage.
home.whyDesc: We don't just provide software solutions we build lasting partnerships that fuel your success. At Forge9x, we believe impactful software has the power to keep customers engaged longer than they intended.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Unlock Your Business Potential?
home.ctaDesc: Let Forge9x help you build, grow, and maintain a powerful web presence. Get a free consultation today.

services.title: Web Development
services.desc: Custom websites from simple informational sites to complex web applications built to align with your business goals.

services.title: Web Applications
services.desc: ERP, CRM, HRM, reservation, logistics, and appointment management systems designed for operational excellence.

services.title: AI Development
services.desc: Custom AI apps, bots, automation, ML integration, NLP, image recognition, and facial biometrics tailored to your needs.

services.title: Mobile Development
services.desc: Native and cross-platform iOS & Android apps with exceptional UX and enterprise mobility solutions.

services.title: SEO
services.desc: Competitor analysis, on-page optimisation, link building, and landing page strategies that convert traffic into sales.

services.title: Graphic Design
services.desc: Visual identity, branding, logo animation, social media content, and marketing materials that leave a lasting impression.

about.title: We are advisors, builders, and innovators
about.desc1: Forge9x is a UK-based digital innovation agency founded on a simple belief: technology should work for people, not the other way around. We partner with ambitious businesses to design, build, and scale powerful digital products.
about.desc2: From our roots in the UK to our talented team in Sri Lanka, we bring together diverse perspectives and deep technical expertise to deliver solutions that genuinely move the needle for our clients.

values.title: Innovation First
values.desc: We stay ahead of technology trends to deliver cutting-edge solutions that give our clients a competitive edge.

values.title: Client Partnership
values.desc: We treat every client as a long-term partner, investing in their success as if it were our own.

values.title: Quality Excellence
values.desc: We maintain rigorous standards across every project, ensuring reliable, scalable, and maintainable code.

values.title: Transparent Communication
values.desc: We keep our clients informed at every stage with clear, honest, and proactive communication.

sriLankaBanner.title: Starting a Business in Sri Lanka? We're Here to Help!
sriLankaBanner.desc: Forge9x has a dedicated team in Sri Lanka ready to support your business with local expertise, cost-effective solutions, and world-class digital services.

contact.title: Let's Build What's Next Together
contact.desc: Whether you're exploring a new idea, scaling an existing product, or need a trusted digital partner, we'd love to hear from you.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for getting in touch. We'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.

careers.heroDesc: Become an active player in stimulating projects leveraging the latest tech trends. Each area offers unique challenges and opportunities for growth.
careers.lifeDesc: Join a vibrant, stimulating, and inclusive workplace where people matter and innovation thrives. Benefit from an informal and close-knit environment fostering true collaboration and teamwork.
careers.valuesBadge: We stand together through shared values.

careers.internDesc: We'd love to hear from you. Send us an e-mail and let's start the conversation.
careers.ctaDesc: We're always open to hearing from talented people. Send us your CV and let us know how you can contribute.

openings.title: Full Stack Developer
openings.desc: We're looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to build and maintain web applications using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
